query: scratched dusty old photograph damaged film emulsion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: scratched, dusty, damaged emulsion textures

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white close-up photograph of stitched skin with visible suture threads creating a jagged line across the surface. The image shows textured flesh with pores, small hairs, and minor discoloration around the wound area. A smooth, rounded form appears at the left edge of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily grainy, low-contrast black-and-white extreme close-up of stitched skin with visible suture threads creating a jagged, Frankenstein-like seam across decaying flesh. Muted, washed-out tones with crushed shadows and blown highlights obscure fine detail, while aggressive cropping cuts off contextual information at the edges. The textured surface shows pores, hairs, and discoloration around the wound, evoking visceral disgust and bodily decay through its raw, clinical intimacy and degraded analog film quality.
